allow: PowerShell($bytes1 = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("index.html"\); $bytes2 = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("temp_latest.html"\); Write-Host "index.html: $\($bytes1.Length\) bytes, BOM: $\($bytes1[0]\) $\($bytes1[1]\) $\($bytes1[2]\)"; Write-Host "temp_latest.html: $\($bytes2.Length\) bytes, BOM: $\($bytes2[0]\) $\($bytes2[1]\) $\($bytes2[2]\)")

PowerShell(Select-String -Path "index.html" -Pattern "ARCADE PORTFOLIO|PRESS ENTER TO CONTINUE|all systems ready|SELECT EXPERIENCE" | Select-Object -First 8 | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.LineNumber\): $\($_.Line.Trim\(\)\)" })
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem | Select-Object Name, Length; \(Get-Content index.html | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines)
PowerShell(try { \(Get-Command chromium-cli -ErrorAction Stop\).Source } catch { "chromium-cli not found" })

PowerShell($tries = 0; while \($tries -lt 20\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:5173 -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { "dev server up"; break } } catch {}; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; $tries++ }; if \($tries -ge 20\) { "dev server NOT responding" })

PowerShell(node -e "import\('playwright-core'\).then\(async \({chromium}\) => { const b = await chromium.launch\({channel:'chrome', headless:false, args:['--headless=new']}\); const p = await b.newPage\(\); await p.goto\('http://localhost:5173'\); const gpu = await p.evaluate\(\(\) => { const gl = document.createElement\('canvas'\).getContext\('webgl2'\); const ext = gl.getExtension\('WEBGL_debug_renderer_info'\); return gl.getParameter\(ext.UNMASKED_RENDERER_WEBGL\); }\); console.log\(gpu\); await b.close\(\); }\)")
